name: sc-medicaid-policy
note: SCDHHS Healthy Connections provider manuals: one consolidated Admin & Billing Manual + ~25 provider-type manuals. Each type page links a single full-manual PDF at provider.scdhhs.gov/internet/pdf/manuals/<slug>/Manual.pdf (case-insensitive). No separate NEMT manual (brokered, ModivCare) and no standalone Laboratory manual (lab covered inside Physicians). curl 200, no login.

docs.title: Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS / CLTC Waiver) Provider Manual
Enhanced Services Provider Manual (Personal Care / Adult Day / In-Home)
Physicians Services Provider Manual (incl. Laboratory & Radiology)
Durable Medical Equipment Services Provider Manual
Rehabilitative Behavioral Health Services (RBHS) Provider Manual

_comment: SCDHHS index lists 26 provider-type manuals (post-2019 reorg split admin/billing out). Captured 11 detector-relevant. PDF slug pattern verified via curl HEAD: Physicians, cltc, Ambulance, DME, Home%20Health, Hospice, Hospital, RBHS, Enhanced, pharm all 200. Index page links go to per-type landing pages, not direct PDFs; the /internet/pdf/manuals/<slug>/Manual.pdf path is the stable direct link. NEMT is broker-administered (no provider manual on this index). Fee schedules at scdhhs.gov/providers/fee-schedules.
